---
title: "talk with mentor"
author: "Anjani Nandan"
date: "2026-05-12"
categories: [netlify,quarto,pkgdown]
---


I learned how to use **Quarto** together with **Netlify** for building and deploying websites.

I followed the setup steps and guidance provided by my mentors regarding Quarto workflows and project organization. This helped me better understand how documentation and technical blogs can be maintained efficiently.

Alongside this, I have been exploring the codebase of `mlr3oml` to understand package structure and implementation details. I also learned about **pkgdown**, which is a useful tool for generating package documentation websites.

Going forward, I plan to integrate `pkgdown` into my package **`mlr3hf`** to improve documentation quality and make the package more accessible for users.
